description: Proficiency at the advanced level in listening, speaking, reading and writing, using communicative approaches. Students with prior experience in the language are required to take a placement test administered by the department. Not open to students with credit for LCA LANG 513 prior to Fall 2019.

optimized_prerequisites.prerequisites_text: ASIALANG 246(or LCA LANG 414 prior to Fall 2019)

prerequisites.prerequisites_text: ASIALANG 246(or LCA LANG 414 prior to Fall 2019)
